templates.name: 11th Workshop Space Engineering Technology
templates.shortDescription: Official paper template for the 11th Workshop on Space Engineering and Technology (WETE). Designed for academic conference papers with support for abstracts, figures, tables, references, and IEEE-style formatting.

author.name: Italo Pinto Rodrigues, Aline Castilho Rodrigues-Siqueli, Yuri Matheus Dias Pereira

templates.name: 12th Iccp Proceedings Template
templates.shortDescription: Official proceedings template for the 12th International Congress on Cementitious Composites and Sustainable Construction Materials (ICCP). Designed for two-column academic conference papers with support for abstracts, figures, tables, equations, citations, and acknowledgements.

templates.name: 2024 Jadicc Template
templates.shortDescription: Official article template for JADICC 2024. Designed for Spanish-language academic papers with support for abstracts, keywords, figures, tables, citations, and bibliography in a single-column layout.

templates.name: 24th Central European Conference On Cryptology Submission Template
templates.shortDescription: Official LaTeX template for submitting extended abstracts to the 24th Central European Conference on Cryptology (CECC 24), featuring author affiliations, ORCID support, configurable headers, keyword metadata, and BibTeX bibliography.
templates.license: MIT, LPPL, proprietary with redistribution permission, etc.

author.name: Piotr Jankowski, Maciej Wieszczyński, Jan Kowalski, Andrzej Jaworski

templates.name: Abstract Template Oecs19
templates.shortDescription: Official one-page abstract template for the 19th International Conference on Optics of Excitons in Confined Systems (OECS 19), Warsaw, Poland. Supports multiple author affiliations, figures, acknowledgments, and bibliography.

templates.name: Abstract Template Smcbs2025
templates.shortDescription: Official one-page abstract template for the 12th International Workshop on Surface Modification for Chemical and Biochemical Sensing (SMCBS'2025). Supports multiple author affiliations, presenting author underline, figures, acknowledgments, and bibliography.

templates.name: Abstract Template Sst2022
templates.shortDescription: Official one-page abstract template for SST 2022 (Australasian International Conference on Speech Science and Technology), Canberra, ACT, Australia. Supports single and multiple authors, tables, figures, equations, and IEEE-style bibliography with anonymous review compliance.

templates.name: Abstract Template Ucm2025
templates.shortDescription: Official one-page abstract template for the Workshop on Ultracold Molecules 2025, Warsaw, Poland (June 24–27, 2025). Supports multiple author affiliations, presenting author underline, corresponding author email, figures, acknowledgments, and bibliography.

templates.name: Acm Mile High Video Conference 2023 Abstract
templates.shortDescription: ACM acmart-based short paper and abstract template for the Mile-High Video Conference 2023, including MHV 2023 metadata, CCS concepts, keywords, acknowledgments, and ACM reference formatting.

templates.name: Ai Communications Journal Template
templates.shortDescription: Official AI Communications journal submission template featuring front matter, title, authors, abstract, keywords, section formatting, figures, acknowledgments, and references.

templates.name: Ai4treat 2023 Abstract
templates.shortDescription: Compact academic abstract template for AI4Treat 2023 with title, author affiliation, section headings, figure support, footer label, and bibliography.

templates.name: Annsim 2026 Conference Paper
templates.shortDescription: Official ANNSIM 2026 conference proceedings LaTeX template featuring the SCS conference class, bibliography style, sample assets, and paper formatting guidelines.
templates.license: Proprietary (Original SCS ANNSIM 2026 Author Kit; redistributed with the original conference template for authoring purposes.)

author.name: The Society for Modeling & Simulation International (SCS)

templates.name: Bdletter
templates.shortDescription: A LaTeX class for writing authentic Bangladeshi official letters. Supports government offices, schools, colleges, banks, NGOs, and general public use. Follows the standard Bangladeshi formal letter structure with বরাবর, বিষয়, and বিনীত নিবেদক blocks. Noto Serif Bengali font is bundled — no installation required.

templates.name: Ffk2025 Abstract Template
templates.shortDescription: Official one-page abstract template for the 10th International Conference on Precision Physics and Fundamental Physical Constants (FFK 2025). Designed for conference abstract submissions with support for author affiliations, figures, acknowledgments, and references.

templates.name: Icsm5 Submission Template
templates.shortDescription: ICSM-5 conference submission template adapted from Elsevier's elsarticle numbered-style bundle (3p, 11pt, final). Provides title/author/address blocks with corresponding-author and email handling, structured abstract and keywords, numbered theorem/lemma/definition/remark environments, example figures, tables, equations, and a numbered bibliography via elsarticle-num-names.

templates.name: Ieee Computational Intelligence Letters
templates.shortDescription: Official IEEE LaTeX template bundle for IEEE Computational Intelligence Letters submissions. Includes the standard IEEEtran.cls class file, sample article structure, and comprehensive formatting guidelines.

templates.name: Ieee Conference Template
templates.shortDescription: Official IEEE conference paper template (conference_101719.tex) using IEEEtran.cls. Standard two-column conference layout with abstract, IEEEkeywords, sections, figures, tables, equations, acknowledgment, and numbered bibliography. Includes detailed in-source authoring guidance and common formatting pitfalls.

templates.name: Ieee Conference Template Ancs 2019
templates.shortDescription: Official conference paper template for ANCS 2019 (ACM/IEEE Symposium on Architectures for Networking and Communications Systems), built on IEEEtran.cls. Adds fancyhdr-based running header with conference name and configurable copyright/footer notice. Includes abstract, IEEEkeywords, sections, figures, tables, equations, acknowledgment, and numbered bibliography.

templates.name: Ieee Conference Template Reykjavik University
templates.shortDescription: IEEE conference-style lab/project report template customized for Reykjavík University's course use, based on IEEEtran.cls. Offers two interchangeable report structures (IMRAD and Design Paper) with extensive instructional scaffolding, Icelandic-character (T1/UTF-8) support, Axiomatic Design guidance, SI units, subfigures, and an instructional appendix.

templates.name: Ieee Data Compression Conference Template
templates.shortDescription: Official manuscript template for the Data Compression Conference (DCC), using the custom dccpaper.cls document class. Single-column, 12pt format with title/author block, abstract, sections/subsections, figures, tables, and IEEE-style bibliography via IEEEbib.bst.

templates.name: Ieee Data Descriptions
templates.shortDescription: Official paper template for IEEE Data Descriptions. Designed for preparing data descriptor articles with support for dataset documentation, metadata reporting, figures, tables, references, and IEEE-compliant journal formatting.

templates.name: Ieee Demo Template Compsoc Conferences
templates.shortDescription: Official IEEEtran.cls demo template for IEEE Computer Society conferences. Demonstrates two-column compsoc format with multiple author affiliations, abstract, sections, figures, tables, equations, acknowledgments, and bibliography.

templates.name: Ieee Electron Device Letters
templates.shortDescription: Official paper template for IEEE Electron Device Letters (EDL). Designed for rapid communication of original research in electron and ion devices, featuring support for concise letter-style manuscripts, figures, tables, references, and IEEE-compliant formatting.

templates.name: Ieee Electron Devices Reviews
templates.shortDescription: Official paper template for IEEE Electron Devices Reviews. Designed for comprehensive review articles covering advances, trends, and emerging developments in electron devices and related technologies, with support for figures, tables, references, and IEEE-compliant journal formatting.

templates.name: Ieee Isec 2022 Posters
templates.shortDescription: Poster abstract template for IEEE ISEC 2022 (Integrated STEM Education Conference). Single-column one-page layout using IEEEtran.cls in journal mode. Supports up to three authors with institutional affiliations and a structured abstract.

templates.name: Ieee Journal Of Biomedical And Health Informatics
templates.shortDescription: Official paper template for IEEE Journal of Biomedical and Health Informatics (JBHI). Designed for research articles in biomedical informatics, digital health, healthcare data analytics, medical AI, and health information systems, with support for figures, tables, references, and IEEE-compliant journal formatting.

templates.name: Ieee Journal Of Electromagnetics Rf And Microwaves In Medicine And Biology
templates.shortDescription: Official paper template for IEEE Journal of Electromagnetics, RF and Microwaves in Medicine and Biology (J-ERM). Designed for research articles on the application of electromagnetics, radio-frequency technologies, and microwave systems in medicine, healthcare, and biological sciences, with support for figures, tables, references, and IEEE-compliant journal formatting.

templates.name: Ieee Journal Of Indoor And Seamless Positioning And Navigation
templates.shortDescription: Official paper template for IEEE Journal of Indoor and Seamless Positioning and Navigation (J-ISPIN). Designed for research articles on indoor localization, navigation systems, sensor fusion, location-based services, and seamless positioning technologies, with support for figures, tables, references, and IEEE-compliant journal formatting.

templates.name: Ieee Journal Of Microwaves
templates.shortDescription: Official paper template for IEEE Journal of Microwaves. Designed for research articles covering microwave theory, techniques, devices, circuits, systems, and applications across science, engineering, and industry, with support for figures, tables, references, and IEEE-compliant journal formatting.

templates.name: Ieee Journal Of Translational Engineering In Health And Medicine
templates.shortDescription: Official paper template for IEEE Journal of Translational Engineering in Health and Medicine (JTEHM). Designed for research articles that translate engineering and technological innovations into clinical practice and healthcare applications, with support for figures, tables, references, and IEEE-compliant journal formatting.

templates.name: Ieee Journal On Exploratory Solid State Computational Devices And Circuits
templates.shortDescription: Official paper template for IEEE Journal on Exploratory Solid-State Computational Devices and Circuits (JXCDC). Designed for research articles on emerging solid-state devices, novel computing architectures, advanced circuits, and beyond-CMOS technologies, with support for figures, tables, references, and IEEE-compliant journal formatting.

templates.name: Ieee Journal On Wireless Power Technologies
templates.shortDescription: Official paper template for IEEE Journal on Wireless Power Technologies. Designed for research articles on wireless power transfer, energy harvesting, power electronics, charging systems, and related enabling technologies, with support for figures, tables, references, and IEEE-compliant journal formatting.

templates.name: Ieee Open Access Journal Of Power And Energy
templates.shortDescription: Official paper template for IEEE Open Access Journal of Power and Energy. Designed for research and practice-oriented articles on power systems, electric energy generation, transmission, distribution, storage, and energy management, with support for figures, tables, references, and IEEE-compliant journal formatting.

templates.name: Ieee Sensors Journal
templates.shortDescription: Official paper template for IEEE Sensors Journal. Designed for research articles on sensor technologies, sensing systems, sensor networks, biosensors, signal processing, and applications involving physical, chemical, and biological sensing phenomena, with support for figures, tables, references, and IEEE-compliant journal formatting.

templates.name: Ieee Transactions Latex2e Templates
templates.shortDescription: Official IEEE Transactions LaTeX2e template bundle by Michael Shell. Includes 7 skeleton templates covering journal, conference, Computer Society, ComSoc, and Transactions on Magnetics formats, with full IEEEtran.cls, BibTeX style files, and detailed formatting instructions.

templates.name: Ieee Transactions On Aerospace And Electronic Systems
templates.shortDescription: Official paper template for IEEE Transactions on Aerospace and Electronic Systems (TAES). Designed for research articles on aerospace, avionics, radar, sonar, navigation, spacecraft, defense, command-and-control, and other complex electronic systems operating in air, space, ocean, and ground environments, with support for figures, tables, references, and IEEE-compliant journal formatting.

templates.name: Ieee Transactions On Biometrics Behavior And Identity Science
templates.shortDescription: Official paper template for IEEE Transactions on Biometrics, Behavior, and Identity Science (TBIOM). Designed for research articles on biometric recognition, identity analytics, behavioral modeling, computer vision, pattern recognition, and related security and privacy applications, with support for figures, tables, references, and IEEE-compliant journal formatting.

templates.name: Ieee Transactions On Dielectrics And Electrical Insulation
templates.shortDescription: Official paper template for IEEE Transactions on Dielectrics and Electrical Insulation (TDEI). Designed for research articles on dielectric materials, electrical insulation systems, high-voltage engineering, insulation diagnostics, and related applications in electrical and electronic equipment, with support for figures, tables, references, and IEEE-compliant journal formatting.

templates.name: Ieee Transactions On Nuclear Science
templates.shortDescription: TODO: verify official Aims & Scope for IEEE Transactions on Nuclear Science on IEEE Xplore and replace this placeholder.

templates.name: Ieee Transactions On Ultrasonics Ferroelectrics And Frequency Control
templates.shortDescription: TODO: verify official Aims & Scope for IEEE Transactions on Ultrasonics, Ferroelectrics, and Frequency Control on IEEE Xplore and replace this placeholder.

templates.name: Ieee Vis 2026 Workshop Proposal
templates.shortDescription: Official IEEE VIS 2026 Workshop Proposal template for preparing workshop submissions following the IEEE VGTC formatting guidelines.

author.name: IEEE Visualization and Graphics Technical Community (VGTC)

templates.name: Ieeeintelec2024 Template
templates.shortDescription: Official paper template for IEEE INTELEC 2024 (International Telecommunications Energy Conference). Supports double-blind digest and final paper modes, two-column IEEE layout, abstract, keywords, figures, tables, equations, acknowledgments, and numbered bibliography.

templates.name: Iepc 2022 Template
templates.shortDescription: Official paper template for IEPC 2022 (37th International Electric Propulsion Conference), adapted from AIAA conference paper guidelines. Supports multiple authors with affiliations, nomenclature, figures, tables, equations with SI units, chemical formulas, appendix, acknowledgments, and bibliography.

templates.name: Ifmbe Proceedings Seriestemplate And Instructions For Authors
templates.shortDescription: Official template for the IFMBE (International Federation for Medical and Biological Engineering) Proceedings series. Provides formatting instructions and a ready-to-use LaTeX structure for authors preparing conference papers, covering title/author/affiliation layout, two-column page setup, tables, figures, equations, references, and ethical-compliance sections (conflict of interest, informed consent, human/animal rights statements).

templates.name: Ifsa Eusflat 2021 Template
templates.shortDescription: Official LaTeX template for the IFSA-EUSFLAT 2021 Bratislava conference. Provides the required two-column layout, title/abstract/keywords formatting, and citation and bibliography style for submitting full papers, along with formatting instructions for tables, figures, footnotes, acknowledgments, and Author Contribution sections.

templates.name: Ifsp Conpog2019 Template
templates.shortDescription: Template for submitting extended abstracts to the 4th IFSP Postgraduate Congress (Congresso Pós-Graduação do IFSP) 2019. Provides the required Portuguese/English bilingual title, abstract, and keywords layout, along with formatting guidelines for equations, figures, tables, and references, based on the abntex2 document class.

templates.name: Ihc 2022 Latex Template
templates.shortDescription: Official LaTeX template for IHC 2022, the 21st Brazilian Symposium on Human Factors in Computing Systems. Based on the ACM Master Article Template (acmart, sigconf style), providing the full formatting structure for ACM conference proceedings including title/author/affiliation blocks, CCS concepts, keywords, teaser figures, tables, math equations, citations via ACM-Reference-Format, acknowledgments, and appendices.

templates.name: Ilass Europe 2026 Conference Paper Template
templates.shortDescription: Official LaTeX template for full-length papers submitted to ILASS Europe 2026, the 34th Conference on Liquid Atomization and Spray Systems, held in Lisbon, Portugal. Provides the required title, author, and affiliation formatting, section and subsection heading styles, figure and table layouts, equation numbering, nomenclature, and a running-header/footer conference page style, based on a custom document class.

templates.name: Ilrn Conferences Template Short Papers Extended Abstracts And Doctoral Colloquium
templates.shortDescription: Official LaTeX template for submissions to the Immersive Learning Research Network (iLRN) Conferences, covering Short Papers, Extended Abstracts, Doctoral Colloquium, iLEAD, and iLRNFuser contributions. Provides the required title, author, abstract, and keyword formatting, four levels of section headings, custom figure/table caption styles, and a Springer MathPhySci-style bibliography, based on a custom document class.

templates.name: Imampc2024 Abstract Template
templates.shortDescription: Official one-page abstract template for the 13th International Meeting on Atomic and Molecular Physics and Chemistry (IMAMPC 2024). Designed for conference abstract submissions with support for author affiliations, figures, acknowledgments, and references.

templates.name: Instrucoes Para Submissao De Trabalhos Na Ii Semap
templates.shortDescription: Official LaTeX template for abstract submissions to the II SEMAP (Mostra da Pós-Graduação na Semana de Matemática Aplicada), based on the official SBMAC templates for CNMAC. Provides Portuguese-language formatting via babel, title/author/affiliation blocks with footnote-style email contacts, a custom title command, and a standard bibliography environment, within a strict 3-page limit for submissions.

templates.name: Instructions For Authors Of Sbc Book Chapters
templates.shortDescription: Official template for SBC (Brazilian Computer Society) book chapters, describing the required style for articles and short papers submitted to SBC conferences. Provides bilingual (English/Portuguese) abstract and resumo support, chapter-numbered section headings, figure and table caption formatting, and citation guidelines, based on a custom document class.

templates.name: Instructions For Naacl Hlt 2016 Proceedings
templates.shortDescription: Official LaTeX template for NAACL HLT 2016 conference submissions and camera-ready manuscripts. Provides the required two-column format, double-blind review support with anonymization and line-numbered ruler, title/author/abstract formatting, citation and bibliography style, and detailed guidelines on page limits, figures, tables, and accessibility.

templates.name: Instructions For Naacl Hlt 2019 Demo Track Proceedings
templates.shortDescription: Official LaTeX template for the NAACL-HLT 2019 Demo Track proceedings. Provides the required two-column format, double-blind review support with anonymization and line-numbered ruler, title/author/affiliation formatting (with author names included for Demo Track submissions), natbib-based citation commands, and DOI-linked bibliography support via hyperref.

templates.name: Instructions For Nodalida Baltic Hlt 2025 Submissions
templates.shortDescription: Official LaTeX template for NoDaLiDa/Baltic-HLT 2025 proceedings. Provides the required two-column format, double-blind review support with anonymization and line-numbered ruler, title/author/affiliation formatting, natbib-based citation commands, and ACL-style bibliography, adapted from the NAACL/ACL line of conference style files.

templates.name: Instructions For Ranlp 2025 Proceedings
templates.shortDescription: Official LaTeX template for RANLP 2025 (Recent Advances in Natural Language Processing) conference proceedings. Provides the required two-column format, double-blind review support with anonymization and line-numbered ruler, title/author/affiliation formatting, natbib-based citation commands, and DOI-linked bibliography support via hyperref, based on the ACL/NAACL/EMNLP line of style files.

templates.name: Intercoml26 Template
templates.shortDescription: Official LaTeX template for extended abstract submissions to InterCoML (COST Action CA24136), 'NextGen Synergy: Control Theory & Machine Learning,' held in Prague, April 2026. Provides the required title, multi-author/multi-affiliation blocks, keyword and email fields, a styled fancy header with conference branding, and an acknowledgement command, based on a locked system style file.

templates.name: International Astronautical Congress Iac Unofficial Template Updated 2025
templates.shortDescription: Unofficial LaTeX template for the International Astronautical Congress (IAC), fulfilling the manuscript style guidelines dictated by the International Astronautical Federation (IAF). Provides the required two-column format, paper ID/copyright/location/date header fields, multi-author and multi-affiliation blocks with ORCID and corresponding-author markers, abstract, nomenclature and acronym sections, numbered sections with Roman-numeral styling, figure/table/equation formatting, appendix handling, and a customized bibliography, based on a custom document class.

templates.name: International Conference On Computational Processing Of Portuguese Propor
templates.shortDescription: Official LaTeX template for PROPOR (International Conference on Computational Processing of Portuguese), adapted from the standard *ACL style files to support submissions written in Portuguese. Provides the required two-column format, double-blind review support, title/author/affiliation formatting, natbib-based citation commands, and DOI-linked bibliography support, based on the acl.sty package shared across ACL-family conferences.

templates.name: International Conference On Geospatial Information Sciences Igisc Template
templates.shortDescription: LaTeX template for the International Conference on Geospatial Information Sciences (iGISc), based on the Springer contributed-volume book class. Provides title/author/institute formatting with footnote-style affiliations, starred and printed abstract environments, numbered sections through sub-subsection level, figure/table/equation formatting with sidecaption support, and a standard bibliography environment.

templates.name: Interspeech Paper Kit
templates.shortDescription: Official LaTeX Paper Kit for Interspeech 2026. Provides double-blind review support with a camera-ready toggle, structured author/affiliation/ORCID handling with equal-contribution and corresponding-author markers, keyword and abstract fields, line numbering for the review version, and IEEE-format bibliography, based on a custom document class maintained by ISCA.

templates.name: Interspeech Paper Kit 2
templates.shortDescription: Official LaTeX Paper Kit for Interspeech 2025. Provides double-blind review support with a camera-ready toggle, structured author/affiliation handling with numbered affiliation superscripts, keyword and abstract fields, line numbering for the review version, and IEEE-format bibliography, based on a custom document class maintained by ISCA.

author.name: Simon King, Sébastien Le Maguer, Luciana Ferrer, Tomi Kinnunen, Esther Klabbers, Antoine Serrurier

templates.name: Isarc Latex Paper Template
templates.shortDescription: Official LaTeX template for manuscripts submitted to ISARC, the International Symposium on Automation and Robotics in Construction. Provides the required title/author/affiliation/email formatting, bold abstract and keywords blocks, three levels of numbered headings, figure/table/equation formatting with landscape support, and automatic reference formatting via BibTeX.

author.name: Borja Garcia de Soto (garcia.de.soto@nyu.edu) and Nas Gopee

templates.name: Mom 2026 Challenge Template
templates.shortDescription: Official LaTeX template for preparing solution papers for the 2026 Model Management (MoM) Challenge using the ACM SIGCONF format.

templates.name: Pdc 2025 Abstract Template
templates.shortDescription: Official abstract submission template for the 2025 Planetary Defense Conference (PDC), featuring the Elsevier elsarticle class, structured front matter, bibliography management, and support for figures and keywords.
templates.license: CMIT, LPPL, proprietary with redistribution permission, etc.

templates.name: Pdc 2025 Extended Abstract Template
templates.shortDescription: Official extended abstract template for the 9th IAA Planetary Defense Conference (PDC 2025), featuring modular document sections, custom conference styling, bibliography support, and figure management.

templates.name: Pdc 2025 Paper Template
templates.shortDescription: Official paper template for the 9th IAA Planetary Defense Conference (PDC 2025), featuring the Elsevier elsarticle class, modular document organization, bibliography management, and support for abstracts, acknowledgements, keywords, and figures.
templates.license: Copyright © International Academy of Astronautics (IAA). Template distributed by the conference organizers. No explicit open-source license specified.

templates.name: Uiu Cse Exam Paper V1
templates.shortDescription: Version 1 of the UIU CSE Examination Question Paper template. Features a traditional university exam layout with institutional branding, mark distribution, Java code listings, assessment tables, and learning outcome mapping.
